executor_steps: Remove the annex agree block from the ATTITUDE process type
Add a new annex agree block to the ATTITUDE.IMPL process implementation
In the new annex agree block, define the same assumptions and guarantees using only visible identifiers from the implementation scope
Replace ACC_INPUT_PC1 with acc_in_data_x and ACC_INPUT_PC2 with acc_in_data_y in the new contracts
Ensure the new contracts are placed in the correct implementation scope
